response.justification: Despite a strong engineering background, the candidate lacks demonstrable experience in agentic AI systems at scale, fintech infrastructure, or regulated financial environments — core requirements for this role. His Google and Meta roles are listed with vague descriptions lacking specifics on multi-agent architectures, real-time credit systems, or AI observability. His open-source GIS work and DLang projects are impressive but irrelevant to fintech AI. No evidence of leading teams from 10 to 30+ engineers or governing hybrid outsourced models.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with diverse tech exposure
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical teaching ability
Experience with event-driven systems and microservices in high-throughput environments
concerns: No verifiable production experience with multi-agent AI frameworks or LLM orchestration
Lacks fintech domain expertise in credit risk, working capital, or regulatory compliance
No evidence of scaling engineering teams or leading technical leadership layers
